title: 札幌記念の後に・我ここに在り

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has shown us all a spectacular race
today! She really is the Empress through and
through!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's almost as if that terror I felt never existed.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Right now, I'm just excited to take Suzuka on. My
heart is aching for the challenge.
choice_data_list:
Sounds like you've sorted through all your
feelings.

Sounds like you've sorted through all your
feelings.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. All that's left is to set our sights on
Suzuka's next race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That is to say, the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's where I'll challenge Suzuka once again!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This time I'll challenge you without an ounce of
fear in my heart!
